title: QA Feuerbach Parent Scale Certificate (v1)
description: Certifies the Feuerbach parent-scale law for primitive Pythagorean triples: all non-root triples have geometric parent reconstruction scale=4; root (3,4,5) is the unique boundary exception with QA closure scale qa_scale=2G=10.

batch_limit.description: Hypotenuse upper bound G <= batch_limit for the primitive triple sweep.

primitive_count.description: Total primitive triples (C,F,G) with G <= batch_limit, including root.

scale_value.description: Feuerbach parent reconstruction scale for all non-root primitive triples.

confirmed_count.description: Number of non-root triples confirmed at scale=4 (= primitive_count - 1).

triple.description: The root primitive triple [C, F, G] = [3, 4, 5].

raw_legs.description: Sorted computed parent legs [min, max] = [0, 1]; min=0 signals degeneracy.

qa_scale.description: QA boundary closure scale = 2*G = 2*5 = 10 for the root packet.

uniqueness_confirmed.description: True iff (3,4,5) is the unique degenerate triple in the batch.

sex_invariant_confirmed.description: True iff every primitive triple in the batch has its even leg divisible by 4.

parent_legs.description: Sorted [min_leg, max_leg] of the reconstructed parent.

sex.description: male = C (first leg) is divisible by 4; female = F (second leg) is divisible by 4.
